facebook.caption:
8,398 reviews. 4.8 stars. Meliá Vinpearl Phu Quoc keeps delivering.

Sit in the Cửa Cạn - Gành Dầu Bai Dai corridor and you get Bai Dai beach access without the main-strip crowds. That combo is rare on this island.

The review count alone says people come back and tell friends. At 4.8 across nearly 8,400 ratings, very little goes wrong here.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Pan across the resort grounds at Meliá Vinpearl Phu Quoc. 4.8 stars. 8,398 people rated it. The Bai Dai corridor keeps it quieter than the south. This is what a high-rating resort actually looks like.

instagram.caption:
4.8 stars. 8,398 reviews. Meliá Vinpearl Phu Quoc earns every one.

Bai Dai area. Fewer crowds. Very hard to argue with the numbers.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
instagram.video_caption: 8,398 ratings and still 4.8 stars. Meliá Vinpearl Phu Quoc, Bai Dai side. The numbers don't lie.
